reference: My daughter, who is eight years old, is complaining of pain in her left arm and leg constantly. She is also very tired all the time and has now developed a swelling on her earlobe. The skin looks purple when it swells. She eats a good, healthy diet, takes vitamins every day, and gets plenty of fresh air.
text: My daughter, who is eight years old, is complaining of pain in her left lower leg constantly. She is also very tired all the time, and has now developed a swelling on her earlobe. The skin looks purple when it swells. She eats a good, healthy diet, takes vitamins every day, and gets plenty of fresh air.
